category_sources: source_facts.description identifies dsvpn as Dead Simple VPN.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description provides the official expanded capitalization Dead Simple VPN.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jedisct1/dsvpn; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies VPN functionality; source_facts.executables lists dsvpn as a CLI executable.
